posts.text:
The Senate said that they didn't have time to debate the SAVE America Act on the floor, but they literally had time for a dog parade.

We all agree, there's no excuse for not embracing the standing filibuster. @kayleighmcenany @RepBrandonGill

Video

Republicans campaigned on election integrity. President Trump literally GOT SHOT and the GOP still won with an overwhelming majority. If we don’t deliver the SAVE America Act to the President’s desk we will have failed the mandate given to us by the American people. Failure is NOT AN OPTION!

Video

I went on FOX with @RepBrandonGill to address @LeaderJohnThune directly: PASS the SAVE America Act NOW or we will block all Senate bills that come to the House. And if you still won’t do it, we will attach it to FISA so you have no other choice. One way or another, we must deliver this win for the American people. There is no other option!

Video
If we could only trade out the Senate GOP for Pamela Anderson. 😑

Failing to secure our elections is TREASON. The people want ELECTION SECURITY NOW. This is the only way to SAVE AMERICA!


Elon Musk (@elonmusk)

Failing to pass SAVE is an act of high treason against the people of America



— https://nitter.net/elonmusk/status/2032440938606522574#m

There are concerns about a lobbying group and their efforts to kill the Senate housing bill, but I did want to let the American people know that there’s only a temporary CBDC ban in that Senate housing package. Elizabeth Warren worked overtime to ensure that the temporary ban was in there versus a permanent ban. 

Any piece of legislation that fails initially can be brought back and corrected if the Senate is serious about it.

Thanks for flagging @Cernovich.


Cernovich (@Cernovich)

I hope the

HOLD THE LINE 🇺🇸


Brandon Gill (@realBrandonGill)

I will not support any bill sent over by the Senate until they pass the SAVE America Act and I encourage all my Republican colleagues to join me.

This is a time for choosing.

We either save the Republic or we do not.



— https://nitter.net/realBrandonGill/status/2032514534489866618#m
The Senate will no longer have legislation passed until the SAVE America Act is passed and on the President’s desk.

We have the votes to block all Senate bills until the Senate passes the SAVE America Act.


Congressman Brandon Gill (@RepBrandonGill)

I’ll be voting “no” on all Senate bills - other than DHS funding - until the Senate passes the SAVE America Act.



— https://nitter.net/RepBrandonGill/status/2032504142246088836#m

Praying for the families of these fallen heroes 🙏🏻🕊️


U.S. Central Command (@CENTCOM)

All Crew Members of U.S. KC-135 Loss in Iraq Confirmed Deceased

TAMPA, Fla. – All six crew members aboard a U.S. KC-135 refueling aircraft that went down in western Iraq are now confirmed deceased. The aircraft was lost while flying over friendly airspace March 12 during Operation Epic Fury.

The circumstances of the incident are under investigation. However, the loss of the aircraft was not due to hostile f
